name: Piperacillin And Tazobactam For Injection USP
about: Piperacillin And Tazobactam For Injection USP is a liquid drug type medication that is commonly used to treat infections caused by bacteria. It contains a combination of two antibiotics, piperacillin and tazobactam, which work together to fight against bacterial infections. The dosage of the medication should be taken as per the doctors suggestion, which is usually around 4.5mg. The medicine is produced in India and must be stored in a cool place.
